About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Your Trusted Headwear Manufacturing Partner
About.storyText: Founded in 2010, we have grown from a small workshop into one of the leading headwear manufacturers in China. With over a decade of experience, we serve brands and businesses worldwide with premium quality custom headwear.
About.capacityText: Our state-of-the-art facility spans 20,000m² and houses over 200 skilled workers. Equipped with the latest embroidery machines, cutting equipment, and quality control systems, we can produce over 500,000 pieces per month.
About.certificationsText: We hold ISO 9001 quality management certification and comply with international standards including BSCI and SEDEX. All our products meet EU and US safety requirements.

Custom.title: Custom Orders
Custom.subtitle: Bring Your Headwear Vision to Life
Custom.intro: From concept to finished product, we handle every step of the custom manufacturing process. Whether you need 100 or 100,000 pieces, we deliver quality and consistency.
Custom.step1Desc: Share your ideas, logos, and requirements. Our design team will create mockups and samples for your approval.
Custom.step2Desc: Choose from a wide range of fabrics, colors, and accessories. We source premium materials to match your specifications.
Custom.step3Desc: We produce physical samples for your review before mass production begins. Revisions are included.
Custom.step4Desc: Once approved, we begin full production with strict quality control at every stage.
Custom.step5Desc: Every batch undergoes thorough inspection. We provide detailed QC reports with photos.
Custom.step6Desc: We handle packaging and logistics worldwide. FOB, CIF, and door-to-door options available.
